steps.title: Spot the contrast word
steps.content: The strongest signal is the word but that immediately follows the underlined portion. The underlined statement (what readers would obviously think) is positioned to be contradicted, setting up the surprising findings that follow.

steps.title: Determine the function
steps.content:
The function is to signal surprise—by establishing an intuitive expectation and immediately overturning it with but, the passage emphasizes how unexpected the research findings are.

The wrong answers identify unrelated elements: species distinction, hypothesis clarification, and experimental method.

That confirms B is correct.
